stem:
State whether the following statement is TRUE or FALSE:
All subsets of regular sets are regular.

options.text: L = {x | x has an equal number of a's and b's} is regular
L = {x | x has more a's than b's} is regular
L = {a^m b^n | m >= 1, n >= 1} is regular

stem: Let L = Sigma* where Sigma = {a, b}. Which of the following is true?

options.text: Every finite subset of a non-regular set is regular
Every subset of a regular set is regular
Every finite subset of a regular set is regular
The intersection of two regular sets is regular

stem: Which of the following statements is false?
